conversations.content: Alice's mouse is broken. Could you rebuy the same mouse I purchased last time? Please apply my available discount and send the invoice to her email at alice.miller@gmail.com.

<function_thought>

Next, I will add the identified mouse to the cart, proceed to checkout, and get the invoice for the purchase. Finally, I'll send the invoice to Alice's email as requested. Thus, I will first call the `view_order_history` function to retrieve the relevant purchase details.
